fields.title: string — article title extracted from <title> tag
fields.text: string — clean article text extracted by trafilatura (no HTML)
fields.word_count: integer — number of whitespace-separated tokens in text

csv_column_descriptions.entity: Extracted named entity string (e.g. 'Miles Davis', 'Blue Note Records')
csv_column_descriptions.entity_type: spaCy entity label — one of PERSON, ORG, GPE, DATE, WORK_OF_ART
csv_column_descriptions.source_url: Wikipedia URL from which the entity was extracted (matches crawler output)
csv_column_descriptions.context_sentence: Full sentence where the entity was found
csv_column_descriptions.relation_to: Target entity of a dependency-extracted relation (empty if no relation found)
csv_column_descriptions.relation_type: Verb or preposition linking entity to relation_to (empty if no relation)

jazz_domain.musicians: PERSON entities representing jazz musicians (e.g. Miles Davis, John Coltrane)
jazz_domain.labels: ORG entities representing music labels (e.g. Blue Note Records, Columbia Records)
jazz_domain.bands_ensembles: ORG entities representing jazz groups (e.g. Miles Davis Quintet)
jazz_domain.albums: WORK_OF_ART entities representing recorded albums (e.g. Kind of Blue)
jazz_domain.locations: GPE entities representing cities and countries (e.g. New Orleans, New York, Chicago)
jazz_domain.dates: DATE entities representing years or periods (e.g. 1959, the 1950s)
jazz_domain.instruments: Note: instruments are common nouns (e.g. saxophone, trumpet) and are NOT extracted as named entities; they appear in context_sentence for downstream parsing by Lab 2

for_lab2.graph_nodes: Each unique (entity, entity_type) pair is a candidate KG node
for_lab2.graph_edges: Rows where relation_to is non-empty define candidate KG edges: entity --[relation_type]--> relation_to
for_lab2.enrichment_hint: Use source_url to fetch Wikidata QIDs for entity disambiguation
